CHART 489
In this chart Saturn is placed in
Mars Sun
Mer. Gemini along with Mercury, and the
Ven.
Sat. Moon is in 7th therefrom. The native
will be in employment relating to sup
plies and services to educational insti
tutions. As after leaving Gemini Sat
Jupt. urn contacts Jupiter in Leo, the native
will become the head of a concern and
live happily. From 37 onwards his
Moon
earnings will grow abundantly. He
will own a house and have convey
ances. After a mediocre life upto 37-38, and getting married at 26, he will
earn by the sale of publications.
CHART 490
In this chart as Jupiter is in Aries with Saturn and the Moon, the native
will be a priest, disseminating knowledge of truth.
